title: Report your actions and renew your licence: A08 or A09
body: "You must report any actions taken under your individual licence to Natural England using the relevant reporting form.  You must submit a reporting form, even if you have not taken any action.  You must use the:   LR08 report form to report actions taken under an A08 licence LR09 report form to report actions taken under an A09 licence   The email you received from Natural England when they granted your licence will tell you which form to use.  Read more about using or applying for an individual licence to kill, take or disturb wild birds (A08 or A09).  List of actions taken under licence A09  When you submit an LR09 report form, you must use the spreadsheet template provided on this page to record details of any actions you’ve taken under your licence:   LR09: List of actions taken under licence A09   How to submit your form  You must submit the report within 2 weeks of your licence expiration date.  If you fail to submit your report this could result in your licence being revoked or any future applications being refused.  You can use the relevant report form to request renewal of your licence.  Submit your completed form to Natural England using the email in the form or by post to:   Natural England Wildlife Licensing Service Horizon House Deanery Road Bristol BS1 5AH  "
